author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Plan: implement init-manifest.json mechanism and --update flag. Key changes: (1) new manifest module with InitManifest struct and sha256 tracking, (2) CLI args --update/--dry-run/--no-prompt with mutual exclusivity, (3) three-way merge logic per the issue's decision table, (4) manifest writing on normal init/force, (5) gitignore update for manifest file
